## Summary

- 

## Type

- [ ] `fix:` bug fix, patch release
- [ ] `feat:` new feature, minor release
- [ ] `docs:` documentation only
- [ ] `test:` tests only
- [ ] `chore:` maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change: PR title uses `!` or description includes
      `BREAKING CHANGE:`

## Release Please

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commit style, for example
      `fix: handle stale control sockets`.
- [ ] I did not manually bump versions unless this is release/version
      maintenance.
- [ ] If version metadata changed, I updated `Resources/Info.plist`,
      `.release-please-manifest.json`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and relevant tests/docs
      together.

## Tests

- [ ] Added or updated tests before Swift implementation changes.
- [ ] Ran `swift test` or `make test`.
- [ ] Added manual verification notes below if automated coverage is not
      practical.
